message:
fix(ui): set Phase2Ready in Phase2ReadyMsg handler for consistency

Phase2UpdateMsg handler was setting m.snapshot.Phase2Ready = true
but Phase2ReadyMsg handler was not. Fixed for consistency so the
snapshot's Phase2Ready field is always updated when Phase 2 completes,
regardless of which message path fires first.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
